classification_rationale: Basic flashloan + swap actions inflate the BNB/BUNNY AMM spot price, which then feeds into the share-asset-pricing mechanism that calculates BUNNY performance-fee mint quantity. The exploit combines basic action composition (flashloan + swap to move AMM reserves) with a share-asset-pricing oracle-coupling that determines how many BUNNY tokens are minted. The share-asset-pricing mechanism is the non-basic element that amplifies the basic AMM manipulation into a token minting event.
